items.text: Locate the store best-selling product data and identify relevant fields
Write best_selling_product_core_data_list.txt to model_output and verify

item.command: /bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p model_output && semfs grep "store best-selling product data file top 10 product title transaction amount conversion rate 畅销 商品 标题 成交金额 转化率" .'
/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p model_output && semfs grep "store best-selling product data file top 10 product title transaction amount conversion rate 畅销 商品 标题 成交金额 转化率" .'
item.aggregated_output:
# rewritten query: "best-selling product data file top 10 products titles transaction amounts conversion rates 畅销商品标题成交金额转化率 促销热销商品数据文件前十名产品标题成交金额转化率"
# supermemory semantic search — 10 results for "store best-selling product data file top 10 product title transaction amount conversion rate 畅销 商品 标题 成交金额 转化率"
# searches by meaning across files in this container. usage:
#   grep "2-4 key terms"                    short focused queries rank best
#   grep "query" path/to/dir/              search within directory
# output: <filepath>:<line_start>-<line_end>:<chunk>  — RANKED BY RELEVANCE (top = best match)
# chunk text is verbatim from the file (the matched line range is shown above).

/model_output/best_selling_product_core_data_list.txt:1-10:1. 2015春季新款韩版修身牛仔外套女 | 成交金额：37200元 | 转化率：2.85%
2. 2015春装女装长袖连衣裙碎花雪纺裙 | 成交金额：25560元 | 转化率：2.41%
3. 2015春季休闲阔腿裤女宽松显瘦长裤 | 成交金额：17700元 | 转化率：2.28%
4. 2015春季新款纯棉T恤女百搭打底上衣 | 成交金额：15400元 | 转化率：2.15%
5. 2015春季时尚针织开衫女宽松外搭 | 成交金额：13200元 | 转化率：1.98%
6. 2015春季新款休闲运动套装女 | 成交金额：12100元 | 转化率：1.86%
7. 2015春季半身裙A字裙高腰显瘦 | 成交金额：10500元 | 转化率：1.79%
8. 2015春季新款衬衫女职业装 | 成交金额：9800元 | 转化率：1.65%
9. 2015春季薄款风衣女中长款 | 成交金额：8700元 | 转化率：1.58%

/product_design/straight_through_tools/zhitongche_data.xls.extracted.md:1-11:This sheet tracks key daily performance metrics for an online store, including page feedback, customer service interactions, store sales, and key product sales. It provides data on user engagement (visit depth, dwell time, bounce rate), conversion rates (silent orders, inquiry conversion, payment rate), customer service outcomes (refund rate, negative reviews, complaint resolution), and sales indicators (recommendations, average order value, unique visitors, overall conversion, revenue, industry ranking). Users can analyze daily trends, customer behavior, sales performance, and service quality to inform operational decisions and improvement plans.
This sheet, titled "OK店铺流量跟踪表," provides monthly tracking data on store traffic for an online shop, including daily metrics such as total page views (PV), unique visitors (UV), and various traffic sources like free traffic, promotional traffic, and returning customer traffic. It breaks down traffic by channels such as search, category, paid ads (e.g., direct train, Taobao affiliate, diamond booth), and other internal sources, along with their proportions. Users can analyze daily traffic trends, source contributions, and customer engagement to inform marketing and operational strategies.
This sheet provides daily tracking data for a key promoted product ("主推单品1") in an e-commerce context, including metrics such as store traffic (UV), feedback, popularity ranking, and sales performance. It covers various marketing channels like search, direct ads (直通车), affiliate marketing (淘客), and display ads (钻展), along with conversion rate, bounce rate, favorites, return rate, and restocking quantities. Users can analyze daily trends in product visibility, customer engagement, and sales effectiveness for the specified product and related keywords.
This sheet provides daily keyword search and performance data for the "连衣裙" (dresses) category on Taobao for August 8, 2012. It lists popular search terms related to dresses along with metrics such as search volume, mall click share, click-through rate, number of transactions, and conversion rate. Users can analyze which dress-related keywords attract the most searches, clicks, and sales conversions on that specific day.
This sheet provides keyword monitoring data related to product listings, specifically focusing on fashion items like dresses, tracked by date and product model numbers. It includes metrics such as keyword category, advertising placement details (e.g., page, row, position), and performance indicators for "直通车" (a type of paid search or promotion). Users can find information on how specific keywords perform in search ads for different product models over time, useful for analyzing keyword effectiveness and ad positioning in e-commerce campaigns.
This sheet contains detailed advertising performance data and strategic solutions for "直通车" (a Chinese online advertising tool) across different geographic regions and departments. It includes metrics such as total spend, total transactions, ROI, conversion rate, bounce rate, click cost, click rate, quality score, direct and indirect sales, traffic source comparison, and rankings. The data is segmented by regions and product plans, enabling analysis of advertising effectiveness, regional performance differences, and optimization strategies for product listings, pricing, shipping, and customer service. Users can find insights on how advertising campaigns perform over time and what targeted actions are recommended to improve sales and marketing outcomes.
This sheet provides detailed performance and optimization data for different products ("宝贝") promoted via a direct advertising tool ("直通车"). It includes metrics such as total cost, total sales, ROI, conversion rate, click cost, click rate, quality score, ad ranking, search popularity, and sales over 30 days, segmented by product and keyword categories. The sheet also lists departments responsible and tailored solution strategies for improving product descriptions, customer service, shipping speed, and ad targeting. Users can find insights on advertising effectiveness, keyword performance, sales conversion, and recommended actions to enhance product promotion in e-commerce campaigns.
This sheet provides a daily analysis of promotional expenses and return on investment (ROI) for marketing activities, including Taobao affiliate marketing. It includes metrics such as daily income, spending, click-through rates, commissions, and ROI, along with weekday labels. Users can find insights on the effectiveness of different promotional methods, track daily performance trends, and plan targeted marketing actions based on the data.
This sheet tracks daily DSR (Detailed Seller Ratings) scores for product attributes including description accuracy, service attitude, and shipping speed. It records each day's rating along with whether the score has risen or fallen compared to the previous day, and includes notes on trends, reasons for changes, and any measures taken. Users can analyze daily performance fluctuations and understand factors influencing seller ratings over time.
This sheet tracks key performance metrics for promoted single products (by product code) on a daily basis, including traffic, sales feedback, popularity ranking within categories, and marketing channel data such as direct ads, affiliate marketing, and display ads. It provides insights into product category rankings, keyword performance, conversion rates, bounce rates, and user engagement metrics like favorites, enabling analysis of product popularity trends and effectiveness of promotional strategies. Users can find information to evaluate daily product performance, category competitiveness, and plan marketing actions accordingly.
This sheet tracks daily sales and popularity rankings of products for a company and its competitors, including two specific competitors and two rapidly rising products. It provides metrics such as 30-day sales volume, daily sales, and popularity rank, allowing analysis of competitive product performance and market trends over time. Users can identify which competitors or emerging products outperform their own in similar style and price range, helping to monitor competitive threats and sales dynamics on a daily basis.

/chanpin/data_review_and_feedback/customer_feedback/user_feedback_summary/user_feedback_conversion_rate_analysis_report_2025q1_key_metric_dashboard.xlsx:3-12:## Sheet1_总体转化率概览

| 总体转化率概览  |  数据来源：用户反馈转化率分析报告_2025Q1.pdf  |  报告周期：2025年Q1（1月-3月）       | __EMPTY | __EMPTY_1 | __EMPTY_2 | __EMPTY_3 | __EMPTY_4 |
|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|---------|-----------|-----------|-----------|-----------|
| 指标名称                                                                  | 数值      | 环比变化      | 同比变化      | 行业基准      | 达标状态      |
| 整体转化率                                                                 | 28.5%   | ↑3.2%     | ↑8.1%     | 25%       | ✅达标       |
| 注册转化率                                                                 | 36.5%   | ↑2.1%     | ↑5.8%     | 32%       | ✅达标       |
| 登录转化率                                                                 | 52.3%   | ↓0.8%     | ↑3.2%     | 50%       | ✅达标       |

/product_design/straight_through_tools/zhitongche_data.xls.extracted.md:1-11:This sheet tracks key daily performance metrics for an online store, including page feedback, customer service interactions, store sales, and key product sales. It provides data on user engagement (visit depth, dwell time, bounce rate), conversion rates (silent orders, inquiry conversion, payment rate), customer service outcomes (refund rate, negative reviews, complaint resolution), and sales indicators (recommendations, average order value, unique visitors, overall conversion, revenue, industry ranking). Users can analyze daily trends, customer behavior, sales performance, and service quality to inform operational decisions and improvement plans.
This sheet, titled "OK店铺流量跟踪表," provides monthly tracking data on store traffic for an online shop, including daily metrics such as total page views (PV), unique visitors (UV), and various traffic sources like free traffic, promotional traffic, and returning customer traffic. It breaks down traffic by channels such as search, category, paid ads (e.g., direct train, Taobao affiliate, diamond booth), and other internal sources, along with their proportions. Users can analyze daily traffic trends, source contributions, and customer engagement to inform marketing and operational strategies.
This sheet provides daily tracking data for a key promoted product ("主推单品1") in an e-commerce context, including metrics such as store traffic (UV), feedback, popularity ranking, and sales performance. It covers various marketing channels like search, direct ads (直通车), affiliate marketing (淘客), and display ads (钻展), along with conversion rate, bounce rate, favorites, return rate, and restocking quantities. Users can analyze daily trends in product visibility, customer engagement, and sales effectiveness for the specified product and related keywords.
This sheet provides daily keyword search and performance data for the "连衣裙" (dresses) category on Taobao for August 8, 2012. It lists popular search terms related to dresses along with metrics such as search volume, mall click share, click-through rate, number of transactions, and conversion rate. Users can analyze which dress-related keywords attract the most searches, clicks, and sales conversions on that specific day.
This sheet provides keyword monitoring data related to product listings, specifically focusing on fashion items like dresses, tracked by date and product model numbers. It includes metrics such as keyword category, advertising placement details (e.g., page, row, position), and performance indicators for "直通车" (a type of paid search or promotion). Users can find information on how specific keywords perform in search ads for different product models over time, useful for analyzing keyword effectiveness and ad positioning in e-commerce campaigns.
This sheet contains detailed advertising performance data and strategic solutions for "直通车" (a Chinese online advertising tool) across different geographic regions and departments. It includes metrics such as total spend, total transactions, ROI, conversion rate, bounce rate, click cost, click rate, quality score, direct and indirect sales, traffic source comparison, and rankings. The data is segmented by regions and product plans, enabling analysis of advertising effectiveness, regional performance differences, and optimization strategies for product listings, pricing, shipping, and customer service. Users can find insights on how advertising campaigns perform over time and what targeted actions are recommended to improve sales and marketing outcomes.
This sheet provides detailed performance and optimization data for different products ("宝贝") promoted via a direct advertising tool ("直通车"). It includes metrics such as total cost, total sales, ROI, conversion rate, click cost, click rate, quality score, ad ranking, search popularity, and sales over 30 days, segmented by product and keyword categories. The sheet also lists departments responsible and tailored solution strategies for improving product descriptions, customer service, shipping speed, and ad targeting. Users can find insights on advertising effectiveness, keyword performance, sales conversion, and recommended actions to enhance product promotion in e-commerce campaigns.
This sheet provides a daily analysis of promotional expenses and return on investment (ROI) for marketing activities, including Taobao affiliate marketing. It includes metrics such as daily income, spending, click-through rates, commissions, and ROI, along with weekday labels. Users can find insights on the effectiveness of different promotional methods, track daily performance trends, and plan targeted marketing actions based on the data.
This sheet tracks daily DSR (Detailed Seller Ratings) scores for product attributes including description accuracy, service attitude, and shipping speed. It records each day's rating along with whether the score has risen or fallen compared to the previous day, and includes notes on trends, reasons for changes, and any measures taken. Users can analyze daily performance fluctuations and understand factors influencing seller ratings over time.
This sheet tracks key performance metrics for promoted single products (by product code) on a daily basis, including traffic, sales feedback, popularity ranking within categories, and marketing channel data such as direct ads, affiliate marketing, and display ads. It provides insights into product category rankings, keyword performance, conversion rates, bounce rates, and user engagement metrics like favorites, enabling analysis of product popularity trends and effectiveness of promotional strategies. Users can find information to evaluate daily product performance, category competitiveness, and plan marketing actions accordingly.
This sheet tracks daily sales and popularity rankings of products for a company and its competitors, including two specific competitors and two rapidly rising products. It provides metrics such as 30-day sales volume, daily sales, and popularity rank, allowing analysis of competitive product performance and market trends over time. Users can identify which competitors or emerging products outperform their own in similar style and price range, helping to monitor competitive threats and sales dynamics on a daily basis.
